name: Taylor & Francis
description: Blog and news content pulled from Taylor & Francis public channels covering API and developer resources.

blogs.title: Enhanced KBART Features for Library Management Systems
blogs.description: Taylor & Francis introduces enhanced KBART holdings automation, allowing library management systems to programmatically retrieve and synchronise institutional journal and eBook entitlements using a Customer Reference Number (CRN) token from the Librarian Dashboard.

blogs.title: COUNTER 5 SUSHI Usage Statistics Harvesting
blogs.description: Taylor & Francis Online supports automated harvesting of COUNTER Release 5 usage statistics via the SUSHI protocol, providing institutional libraries with Title, Database, Platform, and Item master reports through a COUNTER-compliant REST API.

blogs.title: Text and Data Mining API Access for Researchers
blogs.description: Taylor & Francis provides API-based text and data mining access to subscribed and open-access content for non-commercial research purposes, supporting institutions conducting TDM projects across journals and books on tandfonline.com and taylorfrancis.com.

blogs.title: Content API for eBook and Chapter Downloads
blogs.description: The Taylor & Francis Content API enables institutional subscribers to retrieve PDF content for monographs and edited volume chapters using DOI-based identifiers, covering both subscription and open-access titles on the taylorfrancis.com platform.
